--- leading_hint.sql
@{FORCE_INDEX=i}(a)-(b)

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphPattern{
  Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Hint: &ast.Hint{
        Rbrace:  15,
        Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
          &ast.HintRecord{
            Key: &ast.Path{
              Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 2,
                  NameEnd: 13,
                  Name:    "FORCE_INDEX",
                },
              },
            },
            Value: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 14,
              NameEnd: 15,
              Name:    "i",
            },
          },
        },
      },
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  16,
              Rparen:  18,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 17,
                  NameEnd: 18,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  19,
              EndPos:    20,
              Direction: "ANY",
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  20,
              Rparen:  22,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 21,
                  NameEnd: 22,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
@{FORCE_INDEX=i} (a)-(b)
